stemHtml: During a visual flight, a useful method for a pilot to resolve any uncertainty in the aircraft’s position is to maintain visual contact with the ground and…

options.a: fly the reverse of the heading being flown prior to becoming uncertain until a pinpoint is obtained.
options.b: set the heading towards a line feature such as a coastline, motorway, river or railway.
options.c: fly expanding circles until a pinpoint is obtained.
options.d: fly reverse headings and associated timings until the point of departure is regained.
